name: gmail_list_emails
description: List recent emails from the user's Gmail inbox. Returns subject, sender, date, and a preview. Use when the user asks about their emails, inbox, or messages.

max_results.description: Maximum number of emails to return (default 10, max 25)

search_query.description: Optional Gmail search query to filter emails (e.g., 'from:john@acme.com', 'subject:invoice', 'is:unread')

name: gmail_read_email
description: Read the full content of a specific email by its ID. Use after gmail_list_emails to get the complete body of an email.

message_id.description: The Gmail message ID of the email to read

name: gmail_send_email
description: Send an email via Gmail. IMPORTANT: Always confirm with the user before sending. Show them the recipient, subject, and body for approval first.
